reviewDepthApplicability.reason: Review target spans phased spec docs, hub routing metadata, command workflow, agents, benchmark artifacts, and nested skill packets.

targetSelection.selectionReason: Security pass targeted mutating command paths, skill-local resource guards, router metadata trust boundaries, and read-only agent execution boundaries while avoiding duplicate prior findings.

searchLedger.hypothesis: The folded prompt assets or command docs may contain literal credentials introduced during benchmark/profile migration.

searchActions.result: No command matches; one benchmark-doc placeholder x-api-key: <key>, not a literal secret.

searchLedger.rationale: The only match is an explicit placeholder in benchmark documentation and no command file secret pattern matched.
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: verified by scoped Grep with direct placeholder evidence

searchLedger.invariant: Skill resource routers must canonicalize relative paths under SKILL_ROOT before loading bundled resources.

searchActions.result: Hub guard resolves paths under SKILL_ROOT, rejects non-md/json router resources, and only loads existing guarded resources.
Packet guard resolves paths under SKILL_ROOT and accepts markdown resources only.

searchLedger.rationale: Both reviewed routers include containment guards before resource loading.
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: guard present in both hub and packet pseudocode

searchLedger.invariant: Prompt-improver agents must not mutate files, dispatch, execute CLIs, or claim downstream work was performed.

searchActions.result: OpenCode agent frontmatter denies write/edit/bash/task and rules forbid execution, dispatch, edits, and completion claims.
Claude agent exposes only Read/Grep/Glob and rules forbid dispatch, edits, execution, and completion claims.

searchLedger.rationale: Both runtime agent surfaces preserve read-only, prompt-package-only boundaries.
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: permissions and rules deny mutation/execution paths

searchLedger.hypothesis: The command save branch may still lack containment and slug guards.

searchActions.result: Existing active P1s already cover custom path containment/overwrite guard and unsanitized new-folder path derivation.
Save branch remains the same high-risk surface but this pass found no distinct new claim beyond prior active P1s.

searchLedger.rationale: Risk remains active but is already represented by prior findings; re-raising would duplicate the registry.
searchLedger.deferredReason: covered by active findings R2-P1-001 and R6-P1-001

reason: Scoped secret-pattern search found no command matches and only a placeholder key marker in benchmark documentation.
Hub and prompt-improve packet resource guards resolve under SKILL_ROOT before loading resources.
Both OpenCode and Claude prompt-improver agent surfaces are read-only and forbid execution/delegation/completion claims.

detail: No new P0/P1/P2 finding; command path traversal remains deferred to prior active P1 findings rather than duplicated.
